ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Apr-09-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Charles V. Moseley, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sawmill Hardwood Flooring.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sunit Saha, was present, sworn and exmined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kimberly Ferguson, ind. and DBA Environ Distributors as follows:
Damages/Principal $53,114.06
Costs $335.00, for a total of $53,449.06
Judgment signed in open court.
